content.content: Summarize the content of all the websites posted to the 'general' channel and post the summary to 'random' channel.

args.body: Two unrelated items: (1) Latest jobs report shows unemployment down to 7.2%, bringing mixed relief and concern. (2) Restaurant Zurich — a cozy, alpine-inspired spot serving authentic Swiss cuisine (cheese fondue, rösti, chocolate fondue) with rustic wooden decor, panoramic city views, and staff in traditional Swiss attire.
